summary: Forecast March 2026 Airbus deliveries: median 71, P10=57, P90=86
content: Historical March deliveries: 61 (2023), 63 (2024), 71 (2025). Linear trend projects 75. January 2026 was only 19 (slowest in a decade), indicating potential supply headwinds, but January is always weakest month. 2026 annual target ~900 (up from 793 in 2025). Key uncertainty: whether slow January signals systemic issues or just seasonal scheduling. Blended model gives median ~71, with wide uncertainty.
